Complete API collection for Student Team Activity Backend

- Dosen1: NRP: Dosen1, Password: password123, Role: DOSEN (create manually)

variable.description: Course ID (from GET /api/courses) - Returns ARRAY of groups

request.description:
📋 LIST ALL groups in a course

Returns ARRAY with: id, nama, kapasitas, totalAnggota, status, totalRequest, totalKontribusi

Response has pagination.

👤 LIST groups with student's membership status (MAHASISWA only)

Returns ARRAY with: id, nama, deskripsi, kapasitas, totalAnggota, status, statusMember, totalKontribusi

statusMember shows if student is PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED or null
totalKontribusi shows student's contribution in that group

variable.description: Group ID (from previous 'List Groups' response) - Returns SINGLE group object

request.description:
📖 GET SINGLE group details with members

Returns SINGLE OBJECT (not array) with: id, nama, deskripsi, kapasitas, anggota[], status, totalKontribusi

No pagination. Use Group ID here, NOT Course ID!

👤 GET user's contributions and activity in a specific group

Returns: mahasiswa info, kontribusi by thread, aktivitas log

variable.description: Course ID where this group belongs

request.description:
➕ CREATE new study group

Required: kapasitas
Optional: nama, deskripsi, idMahasiswa[], status

Returns: created group with totalKontribusi: 0

✏️ UPDATE existing group

All fields optional: nama, deskripsi, status, kapasitas, idMahasiswa[]

🗑️ DELETE study group

Deletes group and all associated members

Analisis distribusi kontribusi anggota kelompok menggunakan AI.

Role: DOSEN, SUPER_ADMIN

Response: rekomendasi nilai per member berdasarkan post, task selesai, dan kontribusi

item.name: 16. Tasks
item.description:
Endpoint task dalam study group thread.

Akses per role:
- GET (list): semua role
- POST (create): MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN
- PUT (update): MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN
- DELETE: MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN

Alur: Login → simpan token → isi thread_id → Create Task (task_id otomatis tersimpan) → Update/Delete pakai task_id

exec: console.log("Token not found in response:", JSON.stringify(jsonData));

request.description:
List semua task dalam satu thread.

Role: semua role (MAHASISWA, DOSEN, SUPER_ADMIN)

Response tiap item: id, task, deskripsi, mahasiswa[], status

Buat task baru di dalam thread.

Role: MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN

Field:
- task (required): nama/judul task
- deskripsi (optional): deskripsi task, default null jika tidak dikirim
- idMahasiswa (required): array ID mahasiswa yang ditugaskan
- status (required): DO | IN PROGRESS | DONE

Test script otomatis menyimpan task_id ke environment variable.

Update task yang sudah ada.

Role: MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN

Semua field opsional (minimal 1 field):
- task: ubah nama task
- deskripsi: ubah deskripsi (string atau null untuk kosongkan)
- idMahasiswa: ubah list mahasiswa yang ditugaskan
- status: DO | IN PROGRESS | DONE

Hapus task.

Role: MAHASISWA, SUPER_ADMIN
